purpose: Load daily tasks relative to the actual moment the user starts their day, rather than a fixed clock time.
runtime_algorithm: When the user presses start the day, capture start_timestamp.
Choose profile schedule: william, jasper, or shared.
Choose adaptive mode: survival_day, standard_day, or expanded_day. Default to standard_day unless user chooses or app detects overload.
For each hour block, assign scheduled_time = start_timestamp + hour_offset hours.
Never place more than two items in the same hour block.
Do not auto-load every Daily / as needed task. Use daily_choice_pools for optional flexible items.
If a weekly, monthly, or yearly task is due, insert it only into an empty/optional slot and never into an hour already containing two items.
Rest, decompression, boundaries, and caregiver-burnout checks count as real tasks and must not be replaced automatically.
Allow pause/resume and partial completion without resetting the whole day.

currency_rules.normalization_formula: total_copper = copper + 10*silver + 100*gold + 1000*platinum; then rebuild as platinum, gold, silver, copper with copper/silver/gold each 0-9.

shared_dbt_adhd_kindness_library.daily_skill_rotation_rule: After Start the Day is pressed, load no more than one daily DBT/ADHD skill into an eligible open block and keep every hour block at two total items or fewer.
shared_dbt_adhd_kindness_library.survival_day_rule: Daily skill may be reduced to one breath, one checkbox, or one sentence; weekly/monthly/yearly skills do not auto-load.
